spacing_and_layout.nav_desktop: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 border-r border-slate-200 bg-white
spacing_and_layout.nav_mobile: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-16 border-t border-slate-200 bg-white z-50

surfaces_and_shadows.input: bg-white border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-600 focus:border-transparent

components.button_primary: bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center
components.button_accent: bg-teal-700 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-teal-600 transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center
components.button_outline: border border-slate-300 text-slate-900 bg-white rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center
components.badge_success: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200
components.badge_neutral: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-slate-100 text-slate-700
components.insight_card: bg-white rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm border border-slate-200 flex flex-col gap-4 relative overflow-hidden
components.slider: relative flex w-full touch-none select-none items-center (customize Shadcn slider with teal-600 active track)

landing.layout: Marketing grid. Top navigation bar. Generous spacing (py-24).
landing.hero: Left-aligned text (H1: 'Your tax return contains insights your CPA never told you.'), clear CTA, abstract navy graphic or UI mockup on the right.
landing.how_it_works: 3-column bento-style cards with Lucide icons (Upload, Analyze, Act).
landing.pricing: 2-column clean pricing cards with 'Most Popular' badge.

auth.layout: Split screen or centered clean card. Deep navy brand color prominent.

upload.layout: Centered narrow container (max-w-2xl) with stepped or scrollable form.
upload.dropzone: Dashed border-2 border-slate-300, large padding (p-12), bg-slate-50, hover:bg-slate-100 transition-colors rounded-xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center.
upload.form: Clean vertical form using Shadcn inputs, selects, and toggles for the 5-question intake.

analysis_report.layout: Control Room Grid. Dashboard layout (Sidebar + Main content).
analysis_report.header: Sticky header with page title and 'Download PDF' / 'Share' buttons.
analysis_report.insight_cards: Ranked list of cards. Each card must have: Title, Plain English explanation (2-3 sentences), Dollar Impact Badge (prominent, e.g., '+$1,200'), and a gray footer block titled 'Ask your CPA:'.
analysis_report.simulator: Dedicated section/card with multiple Shadcn Sliders (401k, IRA, Charity) that visually update a large 'Estimated Tax Savings' hero metric.
analysis_report.disclaimer: Fixed or sticky footer banner: 'This is for educational purposes only and does not constitute tax or financial advice.'

dashboard.layout: Grid for summary stats (AGI, Effective Rate, Total Paid).
dashboard.charts: Recharts AreaChart for YoY effective rate trend. Teal primary color.
dashboard.history: Shadcn Table listing past uploaded returns with 'View Report' actions.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must have clear hover states (color shift, subtle lift).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' on buttons and cards.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Subtle fade-in for main content areas.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast for all text. No light gray text on white backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY: Add `data-testid` attributes to all actionable elements (buttons, links, form inputs) and critical data outputs (insight impact values, summary stats).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and import Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'DM Sans' in the main HTML/CSS.
Configure tailwind.config.js to use these fonts for sans/heading.
Build a robust Dashboard layout wrapper that includes the Desktop Sidebar (left) and Mobile Bottom Nav.
For the UI, strictly use raw HTML/Tailwind for structural layouts and Shadcn components for complex interactions (Sliders, Selects, Dialogs, Tables).
DO NOT use placeholder image URLs like via.placeholder.com. Use the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs or SVG icons.
Make the Simulator section fully reactive (React state) so sliders instantly update the savings number.
Ensure 'Ask your CPA' sections are visually distinct within the insight cards (e.g., in a subtle bg-slate-50 rounded-b-xl footer).
